title: Marw3n's Designation of His Two Sons cAbd al-Malik and cAbd al-cAz1z as His Heirs Apparent
description: According to HishAm-°Awanah: After cAmr b. Said b. al-A§ al-Ashdaq had defeated Mus'ab b. al-Zubayr, when the latter's brother cAbdallah sent him to Palestine,550 he turned back to return to Marwan. At that time, MarwAn was in Damascus, having won control over all Syria and Egypt. He heard that cAmr was saying the rule would pass to him after MarwAn and that he was claiming MarwAn had made him a promise. Marwan, therefore, called Hassan b. Malik b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
